final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene featuring a smartwatch (all in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "简约商务" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product photography heritage, Kinfolk magazine still-life editorial style, Scandinavian minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a smartwatch (one) as the focal product, a coffee cup, and a notebook
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble surface as the base
Lighting/mood: needs natural side-lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact material sheen and weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
